zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Hulton於1358年出生在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特時，他的父親William de Hulton29歲，母親Miss Arden de Harwarden23歲。他於1392年之前與Elizabeth Atherton在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在英國藍卡爾法爾沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Hulton于1358年出生在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特时，他的父亲William de Hulton29岁，母亲Miss Arden de Harwarden23岁。他于1392年之前与Elizabeth Atherton在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在英国藍卡爾法爾沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilton
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Hulton was born in 1358, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, his father, William de Hulton, was 29 and his mother, Miss Arden de Harwarden, was 23. He married Elizabeth Atherton before 1392, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in Farnworth, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Hulton est né en 1358, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William de Hulton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Miss Arden de Harwarden, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Atherton avant 1392, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé à Farnworth, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Hulton 1358 in Manchester, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Hulton 29 und seine Mutter Miss Arden de Harwarden 23. Er hat vor 1392 in Lancashire, England Elizabeth Atherton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Farnworth, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Hulton è nato il nel 1358 nel Manchester, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William de Hulton, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Miss Arden de Harwarden, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Atherton prima del 1392, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Farnworth, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Hultonが1358年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた時，父William de Hultonは29歳，母Miss Arden de Harwardenは23歳であった。1392年以前にイギリスランカシュアイアでElizabeth Athertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスランカシュアイアファルンウオルスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Hulton(이)가 1358년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Hulton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Miss Arden de Harwarden(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1392년 이전 영국 랭카실르에서 Elizabeth Atherton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 랭카실르 패른워스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Hulton nasceu em 1358, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Hulton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Miss Arden de Harwarden, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Atherton antes 1392, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Hulton родился в 1358 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Hulton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Miss Arden de Harwarden, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Atherton перед 1392 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в местности фарнворт, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Hulton nació en 1358, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Hulton, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Miss Arden de Harwarden, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Atherton antes de 1392, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
